name: Merman Jump King
short_description: This is a high-difficulty platformer game where even slight collisions will cause you to lose control and be knocked back. I believe very few players can clear the game. Players will play as a mermaid warrior jumping forward to save the polluted ocean.
detailed_description:
This is a brand new platformer game where players won't die, but even slight collisions will cause you to lose control and be knocked back. Therefore, players need to have a certain level of mental resilience. I believe very few players can clear the game.
The ocean has been polluted by nuclear wastewater, and mutated creatures are becoming more and more common.
You will play as a brave mermaid warrior jumping forward. Along the way, you will traverse through dangerous terrains such as forests, deserts, and snow-capped mountains, and you might even encounter bosses. But as a merperson, you can only jump. Use your wisdom and agile maneuvers to overcome numerous challenges!
Can you hold out until the end?

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
